fixes.origin:
target = os.path.join(reports_area, item)

with open(target, "r", encoding="utf-8") as stream:
    data = stream.read()
fixes.replacement:
if not item.endswith(".txt") or "/" in item or "\\" in item or ".." in item:
    raise ValueError("invalid report name")

target = os.path.join(reports_area, item)

with open(target, "r", encoding="utf-8") as stream:
    data = stream.read()
